2603.28662.title: AMIGO: Agentic Multi-Image Grounding Oracle Benchmark
2603.28662.paper_summary: Agentic vision-language models increasingly act through extended interactions, but most evaluations still focus on single-image, single-turn correctness. We introduce AMIGO (Agentic Multi-Image Grounding Oracle Benchmark), a long-horizon benchmark for hidden-target identification over galleries of visually similar images. In AMIGO, the oracle privately selects a target image, and the model must recover it by asking a sequence of attribute-focused Yes/No/Unsure questions under a strict protocol that penalizes invalid actions with Skip. This setting stresses (i) question selection under uncertainty, (ii) consistent constraint tracking across turns, and (iii) fine-grained discrimination as evidence accumulates. AMIGO also supports controlled oracle imperfections to probe robustness and verification behavior under inconsistent feedback. We instantiate AMIGO with Guess My Preferred Dress task and report metrics covering both outcomes and interaction quality, including identification success, evidence verification, efficiency, protocol compliance, noise tolerance, and trajectory-level diagnostics.
2603.28662.paper_summary_zh: 代理式視覺-語言模型越來越多地通過擴展互動進行操作，但大多數評估仍然專注於單圖像、單輪的正確性。我們介紹了 AMIGO（代理式多圖像定位Oracle基準），這是一個針對隱藏目標識別的長期基準，涵蓋視覺上相似圖像的畫廊。在 AMIGO 中，Oracle 私下選擇一個目標圖像，模型必須通過在嚴格的協議下詢問一系列以屬性為重點的是/否/不確定問題來恢復它，該協議對無效行為以跳過進行懲罰。這個設置強調了 (i) 在不確定性下的問題選擇，(ii) 跨輪次的一致約束跟蹤，以及 (iii) 隨著證據的積累進行的細緻區分。AMIGO 還支持受控的 Oracle 不完美性，以探查在不一致反饋下的穩健性和驗證行為。我們用“猜我的首選裙子”任務實現了 AMIGO，並報告涵蓋結果和互動質量的指標，包括識別成功率、證據驗證、效率、協議遵從性、噪聲容忍度和軌跡級診斷。
2603.28662.author: Min Wang et.al.
